name: YUKI BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (SNOW REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 5

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, E, F, H, Mas

This forbidden technique creates a clone made of snow and/or ice, appearing on or adjacent to the source it is created from.

Appearance: Snow clones look like vicious, clawed snowmen with only a very crude resemblance to their creator (or humans in general). To those sensing Chakra, the strength of a snow clone's Chakra Signature is calculated based on half your current Chakra Pool.

Statistics: Snow clones apply the following:

- Their maximum HP equals ½ your character level
- They take a -4 penalty to attack rolls
- They take a -5 penalty to Defense
- They take a -2 penalty to saving throws
- They have cold resistance 15
- They take +50% fire damage
- They have two natural claw attacks, dealing damage as humanoids of their size category (1d4 if Medium)

Snow clones suffer a -1 penalty to attack rolls and skill checks when moved further than 100 feet from the source of snow or ice that created them.

Combat: Snow clones cannot make more than two attacks per round.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra per clone to create additional clones. You can control a maximum of one snow clone per three character levels.

Mastery: The fifth step improves the clones' claw attack damage, as if the clone were two size categories larger than it really is.
